footer.description: Obesight AI is an artificial intelligence-based health screening tool to detect obesity risk early and provide healthy lifestyle recommendations.
footer.disclaimer_text: This tool is designed for educational and initial awareness purposes, not as a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or clinical treatment from a doctor.
footer.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Obesight AI. All Rights Reserved.

hero.title: Predict Your Obesity Risk Smartly
hero.subtitle: Obesight analyzes your daily habits with a machine learning model to detect obesity risk. Get instant results and personalized nutritional recommendations.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Empowering communities to understand their body health better through accessible, accurate, and scientifically data-driven early detection technology.

features.title: Key Features
features.item_fast_desc: Filling out the form only takes 2 minutes with no hidden fees whatsoever.
features.item_ai_desc: Uses a machine learning model trained on a real health behavior dataset.
features.item_rec_desc: Get recommendations for fluid intake, vegetables, and physical activity tailored to your habits.

how_it_works.title: How Obesight Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Enter information about your age, weight, height, as well as your dietary habits and physical activity.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our machine learning model processes your data to predict your obesity risk category.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Receive prediction results along with relevant, personally tailored health guides.

about.title: Artificial Intelligence Behind Obesight
about.subtitle: Obesight uses a machine learning classification model to detect obesity risk levels based on daily behavior survey data, designed as a fast, informative, and easy-to-understand initial screening tool.

dataset.title: Dataset & Attributes
dataset.description: The model is trained using a dataset containing eating habits and physical activity info of respondents. Attributes are grouped into three categories:

wizard.title: Obesity Screening Form
wizard.subtitle: Fill in honestly for the most accurate analysis results. Your data is processed locally and instantly.

questions.name: Full Name
questions.family_history: Does any family member have a history of obesity?
questions.favc: Do you frequently consume high-calorie food (fast food, fried food)?
questions.fcvc: How often do you consume vegetables in your main meals?
questions.ncp: How many main meals do you have daily?
questions.caec: Do you snack frequently between main meals?
questions.ch2o: How much water do you drink daily?
questions.scc: Do you monitor the calorie intake of the food you consume daily?
questions.faf: How many days a week do you perform physical activity or exercise?
questions.tue: How many hours do you spend in front of a gadget/computer screen daily?
questions.calc: How often do you consume alcoholic beverages?
questions.mtrans: What is the primary mode of transportation you use for daily travel?

validation.min_age: Age must be at least 1 year old
validation.min_height: Height must be at least 50 cm
validation.min_weight: Weight must be at least 10 kg

result.title: Your Screening Results
result.subtitle: AI analysis detects risk category and provides customized health recommendations for you.
result.prob_subtitle: Percentage of model confidence for each obesity risk category.
